title: quercus crispipilis var. pannosifolia
intro: Quercus crispipilis var. pannosifolia, also known as the Chinese cork oak, is a plant species in the Quercus genus, characterized by its distinctive bark and leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Quercus crispipilis var. pannosifolia include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and improving cardiovascular health. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments, including coughs, colds, and digestive issues.
